description: The Mammoliti are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Oppido Mamertina and Castellace, Calabria. They are involved in drug trafficking, extortion, agricultural activities, and have practiced kidnapping. They have bases in Germany, particularly in Baden-Württemberg and Bavaria. The Mammoliti-Rugolo are allied with the Piromalli, Varone, and Mazzaferro clans.

country_links.evidence_quote: All'estero hanno basi in Germania , in particolare nel Baden-Württemberg e in Baviera .
country_links.context: The organization has bases in Germany, specifically in Baden-Württemberg and Bavaria.
